Title: URLREWRITE_CREATE_REGEX_RULE
Feature: URLREWRITE_CREATE_REGEX_RULE(rule_iri, allow_update, nice_match, nice_params, nice_min_params, target_compose, target_params, target_expn, accept_pattern, do_not_continue, http_redirect_code, http_header_lines)
Examples:
DB.DBA.URLREWRITE_CREATE_REGEX_RULE (
